title: Makefile: "clean" should also remove test helpers
body: Make "make clean" also remove the `imgtype` test helper.

comments.body:
Can you update the commit title or message to indicate the lint fix. 

Othewise LGTM and the tests are happy!  I think you nailed it.

hmm, wait a minute, I actually see two commits under one github location.   Looks like you've a good commit message for the addon, nvm.  (But would like to know how/what you did in git to make that happen).

Opened #221 to just get the `--enable-gc` flag in.  This PR was itself split off from one that it wasn't directly related to, so it makes more sense to me to have this go back to being just one patch once we merge that one.

:scream_cat: `e1df30f` is not a valid commit SHA. Please try again with `98c4e0d`.
:bulb: This pull request was already approved, no need to approve it again.
